facebook.caption:
4.7 stars across 3,363 reviews. At a beachfront resort. On Bãi Khem.

JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay isn't just a hotel. It's 3 outdoor pools, 5 restaurants, a full spa, and direct access to one of Phu Quoc's cleanest stretches of sand.

The design alone earns its own post. Think vintage French university meets tropical coast.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 3 pools. 5 restaurants. 1 beach that actually lives up to the hype. JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay on Bãi Khem is doing everything right. The review count backs it up.
